_description: This file tracks version numbers for legal documents. Used by the Android app to detect when users need to re-consent to updated terms/privacy policy. Update this file whenever you update legal documents.
_instructions: 1. Update the document on the website (privacy.html or terms.html)
2. Update the version number in the HTML comment at the top of that file
3. Update the corresponding version number in this file
5. Add a brief summary of what changed
7. Update LegalDocumentVersions constants in Android app (app/src/main/java/com/droid/ethervox/FeatureManager.kt)

terms_of_service.summary: Added subscription billing details and acceptable use policy

privacy_policy.summary: Added Children's Privacy section and COPPA compliance details

third_party_licenses.summary: Initial third-party licenses documentation for open source libraries
